images.title: 2007.09 - 'Low view on cliffs and surf under cloudy light', sea & shore near Petit-Dalle in Normandy France with a quiet sea; French landscape photography, Fons Heijnsbroek (10540735483).jpg
images.description:
French seascape with a view from beneath on the beach, over the cliff walls and a lively surf on the shore of Petit-Dalle in Normandy France with sun and a light cloudy sky, during late summer of 2007. I loved to take the photo at the base of the cliff wall, with a view from the shore with its chacteristic stones, rocks and sand.

French landscape photo - coast & seascape photography in France by Fons Heijnsbroek, photo in September 2007.

images.title: 2007.09 - 'Low view with sun and shadows on cliffs and sea under cloudy light sky; shore near Petit-Dalle in Normandy France with a quiet sea; French landscape photography, Fons Heijnsbroek (10541083913).jpg
images.description:
Photo of a French seascape with a low view in sunlight and shadows from beneath over the cliff walls and a lively surf on the shore of Petit-Dalle in Normandy France with a light and cloudy sky, during late summer of 2007. I loved to take the photo at the base of the cliff wall, with a view from the shore with its characteristic pebbles, surf and sand.

French landscape photo - coast & seascape photography in France by Fons Heijnsbroek, photo in September 2007.
